description: Composition Grey round neck top made of 100% viscose, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Revel in the fineries of art, music and film on weekends with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish print on the front makes this top a true piece of art. Team this with jeans or bermudas and chill out in style. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
